metadata.description: UIForge — clone any website's design into clean, editable React + Tailwind, with your content.

plugins.name: uiforge
plugins.description: Clone a website's design into a clean, editable Vite+React+Tailwind project populated with your content. Captures a reference's full design (colors, gradients, shadows, fonts, geometry, SVGs), extracts a Tailwind v4 theme, reconstructs it faithfully, and loops a visual diff until it matches — then QA's the clone for WCAG accessibility.
